segment-text: EXT. RACE TRACK - DAY
It's overcast, as a black Ferrari speeds around an empty track in the foggy haze. It does lap after lap, getting nowhere. It slows down and stops. JOHNNY gets out and stands there.
Main titles over black: Somewhere INT. CHATEAU MARMONT - NIGHT
JOHNNY, a bad boy actor in his early thirties, comes down the stairs flanked by some pretty party girls, wasted and laughing. He trips and falls down the stairs out of frame.
Ow....fuck.
INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM - NIGHT

Johnny reclines on pillows on a bed in the Chateau Marmont. He has a bruise on his face and a cast on his wrist. Prescription bottles line the night table next to a bottle of Petrus. He stares blankly ahead. An out-of-focus girl's body comes into frame.
Johnny's P.O.V. - THE TWINS, dressed in candy-striper mini

dresses, cheerfully do a get-well dance for him at a strip pole. A get-well bouquet of metallic balloons are starting to sag behind them; a little boom box plays music for their routine. Johnny leaves them to go in the bathroom. He passes a table with some books on it - Proust and Dostoevsky.
Official White Version 06/04/09 2. INT. BATHROOM - NIGHT
Johnny looks in the mirror at his bruised face and how much more his hair is thinning. He takes some Propecia and Vicodin and goes back to bed.
INT. JOHNNY'S ROOM - NIGHT
He watches the twins from bed...his eyelids are heavy, and he passes out. The twins pack it up - folding up their travel strip-pole like a telescope, and taking their boom box on their way out.
EXT. CHATEAU MARMONT PATIO - AFTERNOON

It's a sunny day in Los Angeles. Johnny sits alone on a bench, with sunglasses on, smoking. A familiar waiter asks him if he needs anything. Two LA girls at another table look over at him with inviting smiles. His phone makes a beep and with heavy eyelids, he looks down at a text message on the screen: Why are you such an asshole?
EXT. L.A. STREETS - DAY
Johnny drives aimlessly through LA, down Mulholland. A sandy blonde in a Porsche smiles at him, and he follows her for a while, then loses her in the traffic.
INT. CHATEAU MARMONT HALLWAY - EVENING
He walks down the hall, as Amazon girls dressed as vampires, smoking cigarettes pass him.
Official White Version 06/04/09 3.
They all check him out and step into a room where a photo shoot is going on.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - NIGHT
He smokes a cigarette and waits for something, what to do next. In real time we watch him smoke and wait. When his cigarette is done, he throws some pills in his mouth and has a beer.
Johnny's P.O.V. - Power-rock tennis routine:

The twins wear short white tennis outfits while they do a dance at the pole for him, spinning around with their tennis racquets. After their routine, one of the twins passes by Johnny and he grabs her and throws her on the bed. She shoves him off-CINDY I'm Cindy, you moron. and keeps going on her way.
Oh, sorry, Cindy.
The other twin, Bambi, leans down for a passionate kiss.
I'm the other one.
E.C.U. She kisses him, then blows her gum into a bubble, it pops in his face.
Official White Version 06/04/09 4.
We hear Layla's voice over black. LAYLA (O.S.) Johnny...Johnny...
INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM -DAY

Bright afternoon sun floods his room. The twins and pole are gone. Johnny wakes up to see CLEO, a skinny 11 year old with messy hair, in an over-sized t-shirt, next to him on the bed, signing his cast. He wakes up to her radiant kid smile. Hi, Dad.
LAYLA, late-thirties, stands in the doorway looking at him like "nice one".
What happened to you?
Oh, some stunt work. stunt... We had a big
INT. JOHNNY'S CAR - DAY
They drive down the bright sunny streets of L.A., as Johnny takes Cleo to her ice-skating lesson. Johnny looks in his rear view mirror. Do you see that?
Official White Version 06/04/09 5.
What?
That black SUV. I think they're
following us. Do you see cameras? She looks back.
It just looks like a car.
He blows it off. They pull up and park at a Mall in the Valley.
INT. ICE-SKATING RINK

Johnny sits in the bleachers and watches her. Cleo, in light blue, with her hair pulled back glides over the ice in a routine to dreamy music. He watches her - her face in peaceful concentration, she looks like a pixie on the edge of adulthood.
INT. CAR- EVENING
Johnny drives Cleo home.
You're really good, when did you learn how to ice-skate?
I've been going for 3 years.
Oh. Really...
She nods. He looks in rear-view mirror.
Official White Version 06/04/09 6.
Is that the same SUV?
Cleo looks back.
There's kind of a lot of those in LA.
Yeah, but I think that's the same
Cleo looks back and writes something on her iPhone.
I'm taking down the plates.
EXT. LAYLA'S HOUSE - DUSK
Johnny pulls up at a nice house in Hancock Park, dropping Cleo at home.
Bye, see you later.
He hugs her and kisses her on the top of her head.
Bye, Kiddo.
Official White Version 06/04/09 7.
She is small climbing out of the low Ferrari.
INT. FERRARI - NIGHT
On his way home alone, he stops at a red light and his phone beeps with a text message: You think you're such hot shit, don't you?
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - NIGHT

He walks though the living room of his hotel suite- it's filled with people hanging out, smoking, drinking, talking...SAMMY, Johnny's stooge buddy, hosts. Some French guy with a big joint is talking. FRENCH GUY (WITH THICK ACCENT)
amazing- it's called the F-word, about the history of people saying

Johnny finds a loose pill in his pocket, he looks at it to see what it is, but doesn't really care, anything will be better, and pops it in his mouth. He pours himself a drink. C.U. Whiskey hits ice cubes in a tall glass.
Official White Version 06/04/09 8.
Johnny goes up to a pretty girl and smiles at her with all his charm.
Hi, I'm Johnny...
She's stoked.
INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM - NIGHT

In the darkness of his bedroom, the party a dim muffle, Johnny and the pretty girl make out, they are laughing, wasted...she says his name excited-GIRL Johnny...Johnny... --as he moves down her body, taking off her underwear, he passes out in-between her legs.
INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM - DAY
Johnny wakes up alone in his bed. Bright light floods in the window.
INT. BATHROOM - DAY
Johnny takes a shower- It's a new day. He tries to keep his cast out of the water.
Official White Version 06/04/09 9. INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM -DAY
Johnny answers the ringing telephone. Hello. He hears a professional woman's voice on the line.
Good-morning Johnny, the car's waiting downstairs. Huh?
Claire will meet you in the lobby to take you up when you get there.
EXT. FOUR SEASONS HOTEL - DAY

A town car pulls up to the hotel, where Johnny gets out. He is met by a few professional young women and an eager PR guy. CLAIRE, a young professional talks to Johnny as they head in. She talks to him slowly and clearly as if he's retarded or crazy.
We need to first get you upstairs
for a photo with Rebecca, and then get you over to the press
Official White Version 06/04/09 10. INT. FOUR SEASONS SUITE - DAY

Johnny and REBECCA, a young actress, pose in front of a movie poster as a happy couple in love. A strobe flashes as they are photographed together. As soon as the flashes stop, Rebecca is glum. She steps back and looks at him.
(with bitter sarcasm) You look great.
Johnny gives her a look like he's not in the mood. The photos start up again, and they pose back together as romantic leads. When the camera stops again, she turns to him:
Is this really it, Johnny? Is that all?
He lights a cigarette and is silent.
Oh, that's really great, just retreat and go silent...are you ever going to grow up and be a person?
He looks at her, waiting for her to be done. She tries to keep it together as she walks away.
Official White Version 06/04/09 11. INT. FOUR SEASONS CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY

Johnny's led into a conference room, where he sits down at a table in front of the Hollywood Journalists International. Some journalists put down bagels at a buffet table in the back of the room and come sit down, joining the others in chairs in front of Johnny. There's a guy from Israel, the woman from Italy, etc. They bicker among themselves over who will ask the first question.
How do you think this role represents Italian-Americans? Another journalist rolls her eyes as an Indian journalist mutters under his breath: She always goes first.
This film has a reflection of today's post-modern globalism? Johnny waits for more, but that's it.
I'm sorry, what was the question?
Another journalist with a thick accent interrupts:
Who is Johnny Marco? Please.
Official White Version 06/04/09 12. INT. TOWN CAR - LATE AFTERNOON/SUNSET
Johnny rides in the back of the car, empty and disgusted with himself. He looks out the window as they drive up La Cienega, passing the Beverly Center at sunset.
Can you turn on Fountain, I want to
make a quick stop.
EXT. BAMBI'S HOUSE - DUSK

They pull up to a small duplex on Fountain. Johnny goes up to it, and the door is opened by Bambi, one of the twins. The car is still running as we see through the window: Johnny lifts Bambi up and kisses her against the window. With her legs wrapped around him, they disappear to another room.
INT. CHATEAU MARMONT- NIGHT
The evening is starting, people are arriving to hang out. Johnny gets in the elevator with some scenesters and another MOVIE STAR. He nods to Johnny, actor to actor. Hey, man. Hey. MOVIE STAR
Official White Version 06/04/09 13.
He answers lamely, and gets off on his floor. He walks down the empty, dingy hallway. He passes a room where we can hear some drunk girls singing along to Lynyrd Skynyrd.
EXT. CHATEAU BALCONY - NIGHT
Johnny stands on his balcony looking out over Sunset as the city lights glimmer. We hear the sound of helicopters overhead. A sexy girl lit up on a billboard looks at him.
INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM -DAY
Johnny answers the phone half-awake.
They're waiting for you at the
special effects studio, they need to do a mold of your head. The map
Yeah, ok. He sits up.
EXT. CHATEAU MARMONT - DAY Johnny pulls out of the parking garage, on to the street.
He looks as he passes by an empty car that's crashed into the wall. A few bouquets have been placed in the bushes by it.
Official White Version 06/04/09 14. EXT. SUNSET BLVD - DAY Johnny's P.O.V. out the windshield:
Driving past Sunset Plaza in harsh sunlight. People hang out at cafes. A Tom Ford billboard looms overhead.
INT. SPECIAL EFFECTS MAKE-UP STUDIO - DAY

Inside the studio, we see remnants from other projects, an alien head, a wounded half of a face. Johnny leans back in a chair as the team of make-up artists cover his head in plaster. They put a straw into his nose to breath out of. We hear Johnny's breath - slow and heavy. It seems to take forever to dry. Later: The make-up artists stand in front of him working with concentration. When they finish, they stand back for Johnny to see himself in the mirror: It's Johnny at 80 years-old. His eyes look out from the realistic old age make-up. He looks at himself as an old man.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - EVENING
Back at the Chateau, Johnny's young again. Just out of the shower, wearing a long towel around his waist, he smokes a cigarette in his room when the phone rings.
Official White Version 06/04/09 15.
Uh? -ok.
JOHNNY'S SUITE - NIGHT
Johnny lies face down on the massage table, with a towel across him. Where's Laurie?
Oh, they didn't tell you? She wasn't available.

He sets up a little iPod speaker system to play New Age superrelaxing music, we hear ocean waves crashing within a gentle flute melody. The masseur rubs his hands together and takes a long, deep breath. We see Johnny's P.O.V. of the masseur through the facecradle: Men's muscular legs with bare feet. We watch as his shorts drop and he steps out of them as he starts his work. Johnny jumps up, holding his towel in front of him.
What the fuck, Dude?!
Oh, did they not tell you how I work?
Johnny looks confused, is this guy a hooker?
I have a web-site that explains my technique. I feel that if my client is naked, it's more comfortable if I meet them on the same level...
We hear the sound of the door slamming shut.
INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM - NIGHT

E.C.U. Johnny takes some sleeping pills. With the only light in the room coming from the T.V., Johnny lays in bed and watches a Gandhi documentary that's on. The narrator talks about all his accomplishments for mankind.

Assuming leadership of the Indian National Congress in 1921, Gandhi led nationwide campaigns for easing poverty, for expanding women's rights, for building ethnic amity and for increasing economic selfreliance...
A puffy Johnny, with heavy eyelids, stares ahead as Gandhi helps the masses.
INT. JOHNNY'S BATHROOM - MORNING
Johnny stands under the water of the shower, trying to wake up and start another day.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - DAY
Johnny wears a towel like a sarong, and smokes as he goes to the front door to get the paper.
Official White Version 06/04/09 17.

A middle-aged blonde, in a beige Juicy Couture sweat suit, across the hall in her doorway signs for her room service and gives him the eye. She looks at him, while she sips from the straw of her Frapaccino.
INT. NEIGHBOR'S ROOM - DAY
We see just a head board hitting against the wall.
INT. CHATEAU HALLWAY - DAY
Johnny emerges from her room still in his towel. Cleo is waiting outside his door with a little suitcase, doing a Sudoku puzzle.
Oh, hi, Cleo.
Why are you taking a bath next door, is yours broken? Yeah...
He lets her in to his room.
What a nice surprise... shouldn't you be at school?
It's Sunday.
Official White Version 06/04/09 18.
The door closes behind them.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - LIVING ROOM - DAY
Johnny, Cleo and Sammy play Guitar Hero.
Do you want to have a soft-hitting contest- who can hit softer?
You can go first.
Sammy hits her arm as softly as he can.
Ok, my turn.
She punches him as hard as she can in the arm. You win.
You hit hard for such a small person.
The phone rings, and Johnny answers it, wandering into the bedroom on the phone.
Official White Version 06/04/09 19. INT. JOHNNY'S ROOM - DAY
He walks towards the window, on the phone. Hello, Marge.
Hi, Johnny. The LA times wants a quote on your mother's book.
(under his breath) Jesus.
He stands close to the window and pulls the curtain back to look out over the pool.
...and you need to be in Milan Wednesday, we can fly you out tomorrow night, or Tuesday...

A brunette bikini beauty just out of the pool looks up at him 44A and smiles, opening her top, flashing him with an inviting giggle. He closes the curtain quickly and steps away from the window, feeling busted.
Are you there?
Official White Version 06/04/09 20.
Uh huh.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - DAY
Cleo perches on the arm of the couch and talks on the hotel phone.
Can we get some milk, about 2 cups, a stick of butter...cheddar cheese. Do you have a cheese grater you can send up?
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - KITCHEN - LATER In the little hotel kitchen overlooking Sunset Blvd., Cleo
makes macaroni and cheese.
INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM - EVE
In the dark bedroom, Johnny talks on the phone.
I'm going away for a little while...(sighs) I need you to drop
Cleo at camp, she's going for a few
When are you coming back?
I don't know..I need a little time...
Official White Version 06/04/09 21.
I've got to go to Italy for the opening there..and I'm going to get my Italian passport finally if I go to some awards show.
Just make sure she gets to Belmont by June 10th.
INT. LAX AIRPORT - DAY
Johnny and Cleo, pulling her little suitcase, both wearing sunglasses, make their way through LAX with handlers and VIP services.
INT. MILAN AIRPORT

A swarm of Italian bodyguards and VIP escorts lead them through customs and passport control, taking their job very seriously. They guide Cleo by the elbows as if she was an important politician. Some Italian security guards and police shout out to him as they pass.
Ciao, Johnny! Come Stai?
EXT. MILANO AIRPORT
They take off in their limousine with an elaborate police escort, flanked by motorcycles.
Official White Version 06/04/09 22. INT. ITALIAN HOTEL SUITE - DAY

Johnny and Cleo are shown into a ridiculously opulent Italian suite. Cleo opens a door to a room with a private swimming pool surrounded by a mural. In the living room: PUPI, the Italian distributor in a flashy suit, is there with his group of people working on the movie premier. Pupi's shirt is bright yellow, with a matching pocket handkerchief, and socks. I see you, Johnny! He gives Johnny a big hug.
INT. ITALIAN HOTEL LOBBY - DAY
The lobby is crowded with movie people and hangers on. SYLVIA, a blonde Italian actress, sees Johnny and looks pissed.
Hello Johnny, can I talk to you?

She pulls him aside off the hall. He goes along, seeming to have no choice, she's not really asking a question. Cleo sits on a gold couch to the side of all the activity, doing Sudoku puzzles. From the hallway, we can hear Sylvia letting him have it.
What the fuck Johnny, did you think you'd never fucking see me again?!
Official White Version 06/04/09 23.
Johnny makes it back to the main lobby area, and is pulled in to a salon.
INT. ITALIAN HOTEL LOBBY SALON - DAY
Pupi and his colorful entourage stand by. Johnny, Johnny- wonderful news- I
to offer you the key to the city. There will be a reception
tomorrow...

At the same time, someone pushes his hands into a piece of clay to make an imprint as a video crew films. An over-enthusiastic Italian TV presenter girl stands by reporting to the TV crew on Johnny's arrival.
INT. ITALIAN HOTEL SUITE POOL - EVENING
Johnny kicks back in the jacuzzi while Cleo swims laps in the pool.
INT. ITALIAN HOTEL SUITE - NIGHT
Johnny and Cleo sleep on opposite sides of a huge bed, under silk drapery. (everything's in gold and jewel-tones, Versace style)
Are you sleeping?
No...should we get a snack?
Official White Version 06/04/09 24.
Yeah.
He turns the light on and calls down to room service. Buongiorno Mr. Marco, what can we be of service to you?
Buongiorno....Yes, What kind of gelato do you have?...ok, we'd like to try them all, can you send up two of each? Thank you, yes, Grazie.

Johnny's cell phone beeps with a text message. He looks at it: What's your fucking problem? Cleo is slumped in a big ornate chair at the end of the bed with the TV on. Johnny opens the door, as two waiters roll in a table covered with silver bowls of ice cream. Johnny and Cleo eat gelato and watch an episode of Friends dubbed in to Italian. Rachel and Ross talk to each other in fast and lively Italian. Johnny cracks Cleo's toes. She squirms, but is used to it. Cleo drifts off on big pillows on the bed. There's a soft knock at the door.
Official White Version 06/04/09 25.
Johnny goes to the door, opening it to see Sylvia being sweet and docile. They speak in hushed tones, and her arms reach up around him. They slip off into an adjoining room.
INT. ITALIAN SUITE - MORNING

Cleo sits at a room service table set with breakfast for three. We hear the shower running in the other room, and Sylvia, with wet hair, paces around talking fast and loud in Italian on her cell phone. She's made herself right at home. When she gets off the phone, Sylvia sits down with Cleo and tries too hard to befriend her. She tries to talk to her girlto-girl, but talks to her like she's a 5 year-old.
How old are you, Cleo?
Do you have a boyfriend?
Cleo looks at her, waiting for her to stop talking.
When I was eleven, I was so in love with this boy, Nino Viti...he lived in this big house...Oh, he was so handsome, and he had a scooter...
While Sylvia goes on, Johnny enters, fresh out of the shower. He sits down to breakfast, looking at Cleo sheepishly.
Official White Version 06/04/09 26.
Cleo smiles at him like "nice one". She clearly wants Sylvia to leave already.
Do you like to ride a scooter?
INT. ITALIAN SUITE - EVENING
Sylvia and the room service is gone. Pupi and his entourage tell Johnny about the awards show.

So, Johnny. We just need to stop by the awards show, it would be great if you can present the award for the best actor and say a few words. Maybe a story about working with Al Pacino, or something? And then we
Johnny is already dreading it. Cleo enters the room all dressed up. Johnny turns and looks at her -he sees her for the first time not just as a cute kid, but as the beautiful woman she will become.
You look beautiful, Cleo.
She smiles. Belissima!
PUPI'S WIFE
Johnny proudly gives her his arm. Shall we?
EXT. MILAN HOTEL - EVENING
Their fleet of cars with a police escort & sirens is off.
INT. TELEGATTO! AWARDS SHOW - NIGHT

A crazy Italian awards show is in progress- Cleo sits between Johnny and a glamorous Italian actress. On the stage are very tan women with big boobs, tons of makeup and skimpy, glittery outfits. All the presenters are hyper, rattling away in Italian and laughing at their own jokes. A production assistant slips over to Johnny and takes him backstage. Soon, Johnny is announced with a big music cue, and comes out on stage, escorted by some glamorous ladies. He joins the local comedy star host, who steps away for Johnny to present the award. With bright lights on him, Johnny struggles through a few lines of Italian presenting the award. Music starts and girls in glitter dance around him.
INT. ITALIAN HOTEL HALL - DAY
Johnny and Cleo are out of there. She rolls her little suitcase down the hall as they make their exit together.
EXT. ITALIAN HOTEL - DAY
There's chaos of movie people coming and going, fans waiting and identical sponsored limousines with signs on them. Johnny and Cleo jump in a car, just missing Pupi and his entourage.
INT. ITALIAN LIMO - DAY
The driver looks back at Cleo and Johnny, who turn to avoid Pupi.
I'm sorry, but this is Miss Lane's car.
Can you please take us to the airport?
I'm supposed to wait, but for you, Mr. Marco, we will go. I will get you there.
Riding in the back of the car, with tinted windows, Cleo and Johnny give each other a look, that they made it.
Official White Version 06/04/09 29.
They lean back, and are silent as they get out of there. We hear the sound of a jet taking off.
INT. CHATEAU MARMONT LOBBY - EVENING

Johnny and Cleo make it back. They are worn out. She plops down on a big couch next to him. Pockets of European and LA show business people talk around them. There's a table of English fashion people drinking margaritas. One guy has a top hat with a feather sticking out of it. Cleo looks at them in their costumes. Romulo, a kind waiter they know, brings Johnny a drink.
Hi Romulo, how are things?
Fine, fine. The same around here...but the fires in Malibu are getting worse. People are having to evacuate.
A tired Cleo leans on her dad.
Would you like a song?
Cleo nods. Romulo comes back with his acoustic guitar and sings her "Let me be Your Teddy Bear".
Official White Version 06/04/09 30.
Cleo falls asleep to the lullaby against Johnny.
INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM - DAY
Johnny is passed out snoring.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE- KITCHEN - DAY
In the morning light of the little kitchen, Cleo follows a recipe in a kid's cook book, making eggs Benedict. She places little sprigs of parsley, garnishing their plates.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - DAY
Sammy is passed out on the couch with the Guitar Hero guitar across his lap. Cleo answers the door. It's Victor, a nice waiter.
Good-morning, Cleo.
Good-morning, Victor.
He brings in a pitcher of fresh orange juice.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - DAY
The guys eat breakfast with Cleo as she looks up a map and route on a laptop.
Official White Version 06/04/09 31.
When was the last time you backed up your computer?
Johnny looks at her like- huh? As she types, she tells him-CLEO You should get Time Machine, then
it automatically backs everything up for you through the airport... She gets up to answer the door, she speaks to the maid in doorway.
Hello. Can you come back after 3? Thank you.
She practices some ballet moves as she comes back in the
room.
Johnny sits on the couch cutting the cast off of his wrist.
EXT. SPORTING GOODS STORE - DAY
Johnny and Cleo come out of the store with bags and a tennis racket. They put them in the trunk of his car, and get in.
INT. JOHNNY'S CAR - DAY
It's a sunny afternoon as Johnny and Cleo drive down Sunset Blvd. Cleo is low in the Ferrari passenger seat.
Official White Version 06/04/09 32.
Is anyone following us? Cleo checks.
No, the coast's clear.
How's your mom doing?
She's good...she sleeps a lot.
There's a loud pistol sound. The car stops, and they pull to the side of the road.
EXT. SUNSET BLVD. - DAY
Johnny and Cleo get out and look at the flat tire.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - EVENING
Back at the Chateau, they enter his room defeated. She plops her stuff down in the entry hall, and goes to plug in her laptop. Johnny opens the door to his bedroom, and sees:
INT. JOHNNY'S BEDROOM - EVENING
A naked blonde- wearing only a sailor cap. Johnny jumps back.
This isn't a good time.
Are you sure?
Johnny smiles with a nod. Yes. He shuts the door, before Cleo can see her.
INT. JOHNNY'S SUITE - EVENING
Come on Cleo, let's go get a burger downstairs.
They head out.
INT. CHATEAU MARMONT LOBBY - NIGHT
Johnny and Cleo eat burgers together and play poker, while they watch people in the lobby.
There's your outfit.
Cleo looks to see a woman in a super tacky dress, and smiles at her dad, like she's going to pick a better one for him. A young wasted girl passes by. YOUNG WASTED GIRL Hi, Johnny.
Official White Version 06/04/09 34.
Cleo looks at him with a raised eyebrow. We overhear some people talking about the fires spreading.
INT. CHATEAU HALLWAY - NIGHT
Johnny throws Cleo over his shoulder as they head down the hall. She screams and objects but loves it.
EXT. CHATEAU PATIO - DAY
Johnny and Cleo play ping-pong.
POOL - UNDER WATER:

Johnny jumps in to the pool. Johnny's P.O.V. under water: Cleo jumps in. She smiles at him. They look at each other as they descend. They exhale until they are sitting at the bottom of the pool. They have an underwater tea party.
EXT. CHATEAU POOL AREA - DAY
Johnny and Cleo lie on the grass and look up at the sky. She twirls a little daisy in her fingers. They look at the clouds. P.O.V. - Clouds floating through the pale blue sky.
Official White Version 06/04/09 35. EXT. CHATEAU POOL AREA - DAY
As Johnny and Cleo leave the pool area, she stops at someone's golden retriever puppy.
Aw, he's so cute!
She gives the dog a hug as they continue on their way.
EXT. CHATEAU MARMONT - DAY
We follow Johnny and Cleo from a distance as they walk back to their room. Cleo's hair is in a towel turban.
It's about this girl, she's in love with this guy, but he's a vampire, and his family is all vampires, so she can't really be with him...
So, why doesn't she become one, too?
Because she can't, he doesn't want to turn her into a vampire, and if
she gets too close to him, he won't be able to help himself...
Official White Version 06/04/09 36. INT. CHATEAU LOBBY - NIGHT

Johnny plays the piano while Cleo reclines and listens in a big chair nearby. He plays Bach in the almost empty lobby. The lights are low, it's a quiet Sunday night. A room service waiter passes by with a tray. The front desk phone rings.
EXT. CHATEAU MARMONT - MORNING
It's the next day. Johnny and Cleo pack the trunk with her things for camp. They get in his car, and head out.
EXT. LA STREETS - DAY
They drive out of town, out on the open road.
INT. JOHNNY'S CAR - DAY
The sun streams in the window as they drive along. Johnny glances over at Cleo. Her face is mostly covered by her hair, but he sees she's crying. What's wrong, Cleo? She tries to hide her crying.
Why are you crying?
I don't know when Mom's coming back. (MORE)
Official White Version 06/04/09 37.

She just said she had to go away for awhile...and she didn't say when she was coming back. Aw, c'mon, Cleo, she'll be back soon. Before you get back from camp, She'll be back waiting for you...and I'll get you there. Everything's going to be fine.
He pulls her head to his shoulder and hold her next to him as they drive.
EXT. DESERT - LATE AFTERNOON
They drive on.
INT. CASINO - NIGHT
Johnny shows Cleo how to play craps. Dealer tells him she needs to step back from the table.
She can't actually be at the table,
she'll need to take a step back,
She stands by him as he explains the game to her and about taking risks.
